name: Staticor
description: Send a massive charge of potential energy hurling toward unfortunate targets.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Send a massive charge of potential energy hurling toward unfortunate targets.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Wolf Sledge, Telos Boltace, Zenith, Tatsu, Tatsu Prime, and Staticor from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Charging weapons, like the Staticor, previously only showed Charged Attack Damage in the Arsenal stats, we now additionally show Quick Shot Damage values below the Charged Attack stats.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.additions: Added a new sound to the Staticor to indicate that it is fully charged!

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing a distorted flat circle on the Staticor explosion (and radiation areas).

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Staticor’s Charged shot firing rapidly a large number of times when Ammo is fully depleted while using Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Cleaned up Gammacor and Staticor FX.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Staticor Ammo UI upon swapping.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaks to Staticor and Simulor FX to try and reduce blowout with brightest Energy colours and Mirage equipped.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip the Static Alacrity Mod on the Staticor in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes:
You can now equip the Fulmination Mod on the Staticor.
Improved the Staticor and Simulor FX.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed rapidly firing charged shots using Mirage's Hall of Mirrors resulting in the Staticor's glowing effects stacking and multiplying to the point that the player's vision is compromised.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to fully charge Staticor if it is attempted without having firing it before hand while using a controller.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Staticor not consuming ammo after the mag is depleted.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.changes: In order to maintain performance we have tweaked the max number of Tonkor projectiles Limbo can create in Stasis to 25 and the max number of Staticor projectiles to 10 before Stasis becomes unstable and closes.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Idle animations not playing when the Staticor is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Staticor firing in place of a held Mobile Defense Datamass if a host migration occurred.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the attack damage on Staticor’s charging mechanic in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Staticor consuming ammo but not firing projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Staticor sitting improperly in the Arsenal equipment preview.
Fixed the holster position of the Staticor and thrown sidearms for Nekros and Limbo.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue preventing Staticor research in Dojos from completing for players that started research in between a February Hotfix.  Clans in this specific circumstance (there were a finite amount) will now only need to donate one Tellurium to Staticor research in order for research to begin.
All improperly Niatain extract lost during Staticor construction has now been refunded to the Clan Vault.
Fixed the Staticor’s charged shot harming enemies while in Limbo’s Rift Walk.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.1 + 18.6.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed an issue in Mobile Defense Missions causing the Staticor to stop firing.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error preventing players from climbing up or grabbing onto ledges while holding the Staticor.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Static Alacrity (Staticor) 
Fixed ammo pickups not properly restoring the Staticor’s ammo to full capacity in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.13
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Staticor occasionally not firing after picking up a datamass or energy cell.
Fixed the Staticor’s charge visual FX on charge not properly displaying.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some of the Staticor’s visual FX firing from the player’s feet.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Clients being unable to see Staticor charges if they are knocked down mid-charge.
Fixed Staticor shots missing sound.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.8
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced AoE range of Staticor charged shots in Conclave
Visual tweaks to Staticor
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed visual bug with Staticor while holding a Datamass or Energy Cell
Fixed Staticor’s “glow” offset being inconsistent
